title: Google Dorking File Processing
content:
This playbook processes files fetched by the Google Dorking integration.
The SOC will track the file owner and classify the exposed data and users in order to contained the leaked data.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the David Baumstien pack (GoogleDorking, community-supported).

Inputs — ExclusionListName: An XSOAR list to exclude files by hash; SeverityMapping; ComplianceMailAddress; ITMailAddress.

Integrations/scripts used: ExtractUsernames, FilterByList, ReadFile, rasterize, send-mail.
